name: chzzk-chat-ui-toggle
description: Chrome/Edge extension for local-only CHZZK chat UI visibility toggles.

scripts.check: node tools/validate-extension.mjs && node --check background.js && node --check content-bootstrap.js && node --check content-options.js && node --check content-theme.js && node --check content-core.js && node --check content-mini-chat.js && node --check content-guest-chat.js && node --check content-chat-annotate.js && node --check content-runtime.js && node --check popup.js && node --check tools/verify-live-edge.cjs
